# About Me / Developer Context

## Role
Senior developer working on enterprise banking applications.

## Coding Style
- Clean, readable code
- Prefer simplicity over abstraction
- Use clear naming conventions

## Tech Stack
- Java / Spring Boot (backend)
- React (frontend)
- Azure services

## Architecture Preferences
- Layered architecture
- API-first design
- Separation of concerns

## Rules
- Never introduce breaking changes without warning
- Always explain decisions
- Prefer existing patterns in the codebase

## Project Context
This project is a case management system for Rabobank.
Performance and security are critical.
